pr.title: [10min_16mb] 0.9641 BPB: LeakyReLU² + Score-First TTT + N-gram Backoff Cache

output.summary: 11-layer GQA model with LeakyReLU², gated attention, XSA-5, int6 quantization, score-first TTT, and a Laplace multi-order n-gram cache.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Performs legal score-first test-time training with SGD updates on validation chunks before scoring.
techniques: LeakyReLU² GQA + gated attention/XSA-5 + VE/BigramHash int6 quantization
Score-first SGD TTT over 32K-token chunks and stride 64 prior to updates
Laplace-smoothed multi-order n-gram backoff cache at evaluation
